home.title: Tanzania Safari | Private Guided Safaris
home.description: Jumbo Safaris offers private guided Tanzania safaris from Arusha. Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire and beyond. Enquire for a custom itinerary.

tanzaniaSafari.title: Tanzania Safari | Private Guided Safari Tours
tanzaniaSafari.description: Plan your Tanzania safari with Jumbo Safaris. Private guided tours to the Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, and Tarangire from Arusha. Tailor-made itineraries for every budget.

about.title: About Jumbo Safaris | Arusha-Based Tanzania Safari Operator
about.description: Jumbo Safaris is a private guided Tanzania safari company based in Arusha. Meet our team, learn our story, and discover why travellers choose us.

contact.title: Plan Your Tanzania Safari
contact.description: Contact Jumbo Safaris to plan your Tanzania safari. WhatsApp, email, or fill in our enquiry form. Based in Arusha, Tanzania.

hero.headline: Private Tanzania Safaris, Guided From Arusha
hero.subheadline: I plan each safari around what you came to see, then guide you through it myself.

sections.bestTime: Best Time for a Tanzania Safari

privateGuides.title: Private Guides Only
privateGuides.description: No group departures and no shared trucks. You get one guide for the whole trip, someone who knows where the cats lie up at midday and which gate clears fastest in August.

tailorMade.title: Tailor-Made Itineraries
tailorMade.description: I plan every trip from scratch. Give me your dates, your budget, and what you actually want to see, and the route gets built around that.

bornInArusha.title: Born in Arusha
bornInArusha.description: The whole thing runs from Arusha, where your safari starts. Local guides, direct lodge relationships, and answers from someone who was in the park last week, not a call centre overseas.

cta.readyToplan: Ready to Plan Your Tanzania Safari?
cta.tellUsAbout: Send me your dates, your rough budget, and what you want out of the trip. I'll have a first itinerary back to you inside 24 hours.

contact.tellUsAbout: Tell us about your dream safari. We respond within 24 hours with a personalized itinerary recommendation.
contact.weRespond: We respond to all enquiries within

formLabels.message: Tell us about your dream safari

formPlaceholders.interests: e.g., Great Migration, Big Five, photography...

footer.tagline: Private guided Tanzania safaris, run from Arusha by the guide who plans them.
